data_source: Internal consulting benchmarks — India market, FY2024-25 engagement data. % of revenue targets derived from cross-engagement analysis across 40+ Indian mid-large enterprise OpEx engagements (₹500Cr–₹50,000Cr revenue). Per-employee targets calibrated to Indian cost structures.
disclaimer: Targets derived from internal consulting engagement data only. Not backed by a single published external benchmark. Do not cite as industry-standard in client deliverables without independent validation from a licensed benchmark provider (e.g. Gartner, Hackett Group, CMIE Prowess IQ). Suitable for internal diagnostic use and directional benchmarking.
